title: tabernaemontana amblyocarpa
intro: Tabernaemontana amblyocarpa, also known as the Mountain Rose Apple or the Mountain Rose, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine and is known for its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Tabernaemontana amblyocarpa include reducing fever, alleviating pain and inflammation, and treating respiratory and gastrointestinal issues. In herbal preparations, the leaves and roots of the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
